title: Warning-INITIALDLY with module or interface tasks, but not with class tasks

features.name: nonblocking_assignment_with_delay_in_class_task
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment with a delay inside an automatic task defined within a class
features.snippet: class c; task automatic t(); field <= #5ns 42; endtask endclass

features.name: nonblocking_assignment_with_delay_in_interface_task
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment with a delay inside an automatic task defined within an interface
features.snippet: interface INTF(); logic [7:0] f; task automatic set(); f <= #5ns 42; endtask endinterface

features.name: nonblocking_assignment_with_delay_in_module_task
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment with a delay inside an automatic task defined within a module
features.snippet: module top(); logic [7:0] f; task automatic set(); f <= #5ns 42; endtask endmodule

features.name: class_with_virtual_interface
features.description: Code should include a class that has a virtual interface member and uses it in a task with non-blocking assignment
features.snippet:
interface INTF(); logic [7:0] f; endinterface
class c; virtual INTF intf; task automatic t(); intf.f <= #5ns 42; endtask endclass
